title: College Admissions | #shorts
full_text: V what do you need from a therapist just tell me what your problem is I'm going to solve it right as forget I'm your mom since now that my brother's going to an IV lady and my sister is going the best college in the world there's so much pressure on me what's the issue that there's so much pressure on me yeah you should go to a good college but what about the pressure I'm feeling why are you feeling pressure are you the dumb one in the family no but there's so much pressure to succeed yes you should succeed that's right what about the feelings you will feel good when you succeed but what if I don't succeed why will you not succeed so the issue is the fear of not succeeding which is totally irrational probably comes from your dad's side most specifically his mother but genetically if my side dominates the way it did for your brother and sister you're going to not have a problem well to be honest I think the fear comes from you who taught you to be a traitor like this
